title: PVP REFORGED [RP]
description: All the pvp essentials you will ever need in 1 resouce pack saving u  a lot of time.
body:
# ⚔️ PVP REFORGED ⚔️           
### 🚀 Core Features      
- Low fire
- small items
- small swords
- small blocks
- small totem and shield
- small block fire
- no fire smoke
- animated crossbow
- animated bow
- bright ores
- clear water and lava
- no pumkin blur
- smaller Totem Pop
- smaller totem particles
- no explosion particles
- No Vignette
- No Eating Particles
---
**The Ultimate Utility & Overlay Overhaul**

A resource pack made to be used with the modpack named "PVP Reforged"
---
